_help: Copy this file to ~/.agentic-os/config.json (or to agentic-os.config.json in the project root) and edit the paths to match your machine. Anything you leave out auto-detects or falls back to sensible defaults.
_paths_note: Leave as null to auto-detect via `which`. Or paste the full path you get from `which claude` etc.
_vault_note: Full path to your Obsidian vault. Leave null and we'll try ~/Documents/Obsidian Vault, ~/Obsidian, ~/Obsidian Vault.
_agent_note: Which openclaw agent to chat with by default (main, julian, marketing, etc.). Run `openclaw agents list` to see yours.
_location_note: Shown in the top-bar timestamp. e.g. "Bangkok", "London", or just "Local".
